parameters.content:
## TikTok Visual Hook Splitter

### How it works

1. Listens for a TikTok URL submission and triggers the workflow.
2. Downloads the video and initiates scene detection via Renderio.
3. Waits for the detection process, checks the status, and handles retries if needed.
4. Parses the detected scenes and splits the video using an HTTP request.
5. Monitors the split process, handles retries, and displays the download link when completed.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure formTrigger for TikTok URL submission.
- [ ] Ensure Renderio API is accessible and configured.
- [ ] Set HTTP request parameters for video splitting.

### Customization

The wait times and retry logic can be customized for preferred duration and conditions.

## Trigger and initiate detection

Starts when a TikTok URL is submitted, downloading the video and beginning scene detection.

## Scene detection status check

Waits and checks if scene detection is complete, managing retries if detection isn't done.

## Parse and split scene

Handles parsing of detected scene cuts and splitting the video via HTTP request.

## Monitor and retry split

Monitors the status of the video split, with retry logic if necessary.

## Display download link

Shows the link for downloading the split visual hook once processing is complete.

parameters.formDescription: Paste a TikTok URL where the first 1-6 seconds are a reaction shot (smile, cry, gasp) and the rest is an app/product demo. The workflow auto-detects the reaction-to-demo cut with FFmpeg, then trims the source at that exact time. Ready to feed into Kling motion control with your AI avatar to mass-produce on-brand UGC reactions.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ input_files: { in_video: $json.sourceVideoUrl }, output_files: { out_hook: 'visual_hook.mp4' }, ffmpeg_command: '-i <<in_video>> -t ' + $json.hookEndSec + ' -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -crf 20 -c:a aac -b:a 128k -movflags +faststart <<out_hook>>' }) }}

parameters.completionMessage:
=Status: **{{ $json.status }}**

Hook end time: **{{ $('Extract Initial Scene Cut').item.json.hookEndSec }}s** (detection: {{ $('Extract Initial Scene Cut').item.json.reason }})

All scene cuts detected: {{ JSON.stringify($('Extract Initial Scene Cut').item.json.allSceneCuts) }}

[Download visual hook MP4]({{ $json.output_files.out_hook.storage_url }})

Feed this clip into RenderIO + Kling motion control with your AI avatar to mass-produce on-brand UGC reactions.
